author: Crystal Carter
title: Generative engine optimization (GEO): How to win AI mentions
content: Foundational article on Generative Engine Optimization explaining how to achieve visibility and mentions in AI search results. Carter covers the fundamentals of GEO, the differences between traditional SEO and optimization for LLMs, brand entity management strategies, and tactics for improving likelihood of citation in AI responses. The article addresses content structuring, source selection by LLMs, and how Reddit, LinkedIn, and YouTube rank among top sources cited by major LLMs as of October 2025.
